name: Example Plugin
author: ASF
description: A complete example plugin demonstrating the Saydo Plugin API: tasks, projects, tags, events, commands, status bar, and settings.

settings.name: Greeting Text
settings.description: The text to display when the greet command is run

settings.name: Show Task Count
settings.description: Show the number of pending tasks in the status bar

settings.name: Default Priority
settings.description: Default priority for tasks created by this plugin
